comment: Evidence-verified anomaly-screen suppressions (OPT-G3 Tier B). A flag matching {check, name_prefix} is counted as 'verified' instead of raising. Every entry must cite its evidence.

entries.reason: Tooltip-verified 2026-06-11 (4 archive captures: Assault Korazin/Ring, Raid Korazin, Ward Taj) — every DB value matches in-game exactly; the uniform +31% budget is real premium design. Note: Fandom wiki documents an older IL-430 line under the same name; our IL-602 captures are authoritative for the current console game.

Tooltip-verified 2026-06-11 (5 captures covering all 3 bonus names: Survivor's Strike/Savagery/Finesse) — the 10,000-rating grants are real HP-threshold-conditional design, faithfully stored (alwaysActive:false; OPT-G1 threshold weighting applies).

Wiki-verified 2026-06-11 (per-tier Fandom pages + Arc forum history): 4,000 flat for 2/4/6/8/10s every 30s in combat is the real Mod-9 Underdark Ring design (only the Mod-11 companion exploit was nerfed). uptimeOverride=duration/30 applied to all 20 bonuses so the engine credits true ~7-33% uptime.

Tooltip + DB-description verified 2026-06-11: 'Heal Self 50' is the Drowned Heart 2-pc set proc (when struck, heal 50% Max HP over 30s, 30s CD). Legit values; 'Heal Self' is not an engine-scored stat so it cannot inflate builds. Full HoT remodel deferred to the resource/heal proc layer (toon_coverage Missing-1).
